arts.ttl: Brighton vs Fulham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion are aiming to extend their five-game winning streak on Saturday when they host Fulham in the Premier League. Fulham have also managed more away points than home in the Premier League this term and can leapfrog Brighton in the standings with victory on the south coast.
